zh.Chambéry, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France: 法國o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊哈恩貝利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes de Savoie於1103年出生在法國o-阿爾培斯豪-薩福哈莫尼-蒙吉布藍時，她的父親Humbert II de Savoie37歲，母親Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté29歲。她於從1130年1月8日到1138年1月7日與Archambaud de BOURBON VII結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1183年在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯阿利也布爾波-利阿哈波奧爾特享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes de Savoie于1103年出生在法国o-阿爾培斯豪-薩福哈莫尼-蒙吉布藍时，她的父亲Humbert II de Savoie37岁，母亲Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté29岁。她于从1130年1月8日到1138年1月7日与Archambaud de BOURBON VII结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1183年在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯阿利也布爾波-利阿哈波奧爾特享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Savoie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Pierre, Marcel, Damien, Jacques, Normand, Raoul, Alphonse, Antoine, Armand, Julien, Alcee.
French: habitational name from Savoy (French name Savoie), a region in the southeastern part of France, or from (La) Savoie, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Savoy .

History: Savoy was consolidated in the 11th century by count Humbert the White-Handed (Humbert aux blanches-mains). He was the founder of the great European noble house of Savoy, with large holdings of territory in France, Switzerland, and present-day Italy.

variants.name: Savoy
meanings: Altered form of French   Savoie  . It is also found in England, as an Anglicized surname of Huguenot origin.

variants.name: Savoia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Aldo, Salvatore, Antonio, Dante, Enzo, Franco, Italo, Piero, Reno, Umberto, Vito.
Italian: habitational name from Savoy, in France, named Savoia in Italian. See Savoie .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes de Savoie was born in 1103, in Chamonix-Mont-Blanc, Haute-Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France, her father, Humbert II de Savoie, was 37 and her mother, Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté, was 29. She married Archambaud de BOURBON VII from 8 January 1130 to 7 January 1138. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1183, in Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes de Savoie est née en 1103, à Chamonix-Mont-Blanc, Haute-Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Humbert II de Savoie, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Archambaud de BOURBON VII du 8 janvier 1130 au 7 janvier 1138. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1183, à Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes de Savoie 1103 in Chamonix-Mont-Blanc, Haute-Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Humbert II de Savoie 37 und ihre Mutter Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté 29. Sie hat von 8. Januar 1130 bis 7. Januar 1138 Archambaud de BOURBON VII geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1183 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Savoie è nata il nel 1103 nel Chamonix-Mont-Blanc, Haute-Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, sua padre, Humbert II de Savoie, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Archambaud de BOURBON VII da 8 gennaio 1130 a 7 gennaio 1138. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1183, nel Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Savoieが1103年にフランスルhoネ-アルペスハウテ-サボイチャモニクス-モント-ブランックで生まれた時，父Humbert II de Savoieは37歳，母Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comtéは29歳であった。から1130年1月8日まで1138年1月7日にArchambaud de BOURBON VIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1183年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスアリールボウルボン-ル'アルチャンバウルトで80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Savoie(이)가 1103년 프랑스 ho니-알프스 하테-사보이 챔니스-몽-블랭크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Humbert II de Savoie(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1130년 1월 8일부터 1138년 1월 7일까지 Archambaud de BOURBON VII(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1183년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 앨리어 부르보-'아르챔바트에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

lv.1130/1137: no 1130. gada 8. janvāra līdz 1138. gada 7. janvārim

mn.1130/1137: 1130 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 8-аас 1138 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 7 хүртэл

pt.1130/1137: de 8 de janeiro de 1130 a 7 de janeiro de 1138
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Savoie nasceu em 1103, em Chamonix-Mont-Blanc, Haute-Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Humbert II de Savoie, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Archambaud de BOURBON VII de 8 de janeiro de 1130 a 7 de janeiro de 1138. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1183, em Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes de Savoie родилась в 1103 г. в местности чамоникс-монт-бланк, хауте-савои, рoне-алпесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Humbert II de Savoie было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Archambaud de BOURBON VII с 8 января 1130 по 7 января 1138. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1183 г. в местности бурбон-л'арчамбаулт, аллиир, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 80 лет.

es.1130/1137: desde 8 de enero de 1130 hasta 7 de enero de 1138
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes de Savoie nació en 1103, en Chamonix-Mont-Blanc, Haute-Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Humbert II de Savoie, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Archambaud de BOURBON VII desde 8 de enero de 1130 hasta 7 de enero de 1138. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1183, en Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 80 años.
